narrative:
02 Ohio House district has 77,741 registered voters, with 64.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 6.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 22.4 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +7.3% D−R vs +34.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
